entry.content: Mensaje a quienes viajan en transporte público en Edomex. ¿Por qué López Obrador frenó impuestos a refrescos? Las rutas de combis más peligrosas en Edomex. La probabilidad que haya semáforo verde para octubre. Lady 3 pesos se disculpa por insultar a guardia de Walmart.
entry.summary: Mensaje a quienes viajan en transporte público en Edomex. ¿Por qué López Obrador frenó impuestos a refrescos? Las rutas de combis más peligrosas en Edomex. La probabilidad que haya semáforo verde para octubre. Lady 3 pesos se disculpa por insultar a guardia de Walmart.

entry.title: Operate Your Business Like You’ll Run It Forever

link.title: Operate Your Business Like You’ll Run It Forever

entry.content: The owner of snack company Just the Cheese shares lessons he learned before and since getting into the family business.
entry.summary: The owner of snack company Just the Cheese shares lessons he learned before and since getting into the family business.

entry.title: Notre Dame: Hasar görmüş katedralde sanal gezinti

link.title: Notre Dame: Hasar görmüş katedralde sanal gezinti

entry.content: 15 Nisan 2019’de tüm dünya Fransa başkentinde alevler içinde yanan bir tarihî yapının akıbetinin ne olacağına odaklanmıştı.Bir Fransız film ekibi, modern teknoloji yardımıyla, tüm dünyadan ziyaretçilerin katedralin içinde sanal bir gezinti yapmasına olanak sağladı. Bu olanak, salgın ve sokağa çıkma kısıntılarının olduğu bir dönemde gerçek bir gezintiye alternatif oluşturabilir.
entry.summary: 15 Nisan 2019’de tüm dünya Fransa başkentinde alevler içinde yanan bir tarihî yapının akıbetinin ne olacağına odaklanmıştı.Bir Fransız film ekibi, modern teknoloji yardımıyla, tüm dünyadan ziyaretçilerin katedralin içinde sanal bir gezinti yapmasına olanak sağladı. Bu olanak, salgın ve sokağa çıkma kısıntılarının olduğu bir dönemde gerçek bir gezintiye alternatif oluşturabilir.

entry.title: Jacob Blake s’exprime pour la première fois depuis son lit d’hôpital

link.title: Jacob Blake s’exprime pour la première fois depuis son lit d’hôpital

entry.content: Jacob Blake avait été grièvement blessé de sept balles dans le dos par un agent de police lors d’un contrôle.
entry.summary: Jacob Blake avait été grièvement blessé de sept balles dans le dos par un agent de police lors d’un contrôle.

entry.title: US Justice Department seeks to defend Trump in rape case

link.title: US Justice Department seeks to defend Trump in rape case

entry.content: The unusual move means government lawyers would defend the US president at the expense of American taxpayers in a defamation case brought by a prominent columnist.
entry.summary: The unusual move means government lawyers would defend the US president at the expense of American taxpayers in a defamation case brought by a prominent columnist.

entry.title: Ganja ಬಗ್ಗೆ ತಪ್ಪು ಕಲ್ಪನೆ ಬೇಡ , ಮುಕ್ತವಾಗಿ ಚರ್ಚಿಸೋಣ ಬನ್ನಿ Rakesh Adiga Filmibeat Kannada

entry.content: ಸ್ಯಾಂಡಲ್ ವುಡ್ ಡ್ರಗ್ಸ್ ಮಾಫಿಯಾ ಬೆನ್ನಲ್ಲೇ ಈಗ ರಾಕೇಶ್ ಅಡಿಗ ಸುದ್ದಿಯಲ್ಲಿ ಇದ್ದಾರೆ. ಗಾಂಜಾ ಬಗ್ಗೆ ಕೆಲವು ತಪ್ಪು ನಂಬಿಕೆಗಳಿವೆ . ಅವುಗಳನ್ನು ರಾಕೇಶ್ ಎತ್ತಿ ಹಿಡಿದಿದ್ದಾರೆ
entry.summary: ಸ್ಯಾಂಡಲ್ ವುಡ್ ಡ್ರಗ್ಸ್ ಮಾಫಿಯಾ ಬೆನ್ನಲ್ಲೇ ಈಗ ರಾಕೇಶ್ ಅಡಿಗ ಸುದ್ದಿಯಲ್ಲಿ ಇದ್ದಾರೆ. ಗಾಂಜಾ ಬಗ್ಗೆ ಕೆಲವು ತಪ್ಪು ನಂಬಿಕೆಗಳಿವೆ . ಅವುಗಳನ್ನು ರಾಕೇಶ್ ಎತ್ತಿ ಹಿಡಿದಿದ್ದಾರೆ

entry.title: Virtual Q&A: Beneteau Oceanis Yacht 54

link.title: Virtual Q&A: Beneteau Oceanis Yacht 54

entry.content: With an emphasis on build quality, high-end materials, and the innovative vision that has always been a staple of the BENETEAU brand, the Oceanis Yacht 54 truly represents the pinnacle of the modern monohull cruising design. Editor Mark Pillsbury recently sat down with BENETEAU to get the inside scoop.
entry.summary: With an emphasis on build quality, high-end materials, and the innovative vision that has always been a staple of the BENETEAU brand, the Oceanis Yacht 54 truly represents the pinnacle of the modern monohull cruising design. Editor Mark Pillsbury recently sat down with BENETEAU to get the inside scoop.

entry.title: Teachers Are Spending Their Own Money On School Supplies Due To COVID-19

link.title: Teachers Are Spending Their Own Money On School Supplies Due To COVID-19

entry.content:
For years, public school teachers have been digging into their own pockets to make up for school supply shortfalls.
Impoverished school supply budgets and ill-equipped students, combined with demanding performance standards, leave teachers with little choice.
And according to HuffPost, it appears the COVID-19 pandemic has made things even worse.
Teachers who are still teaching in brick-and-mortar schools are personally supplying masks and hand sanitizer to keep their classrooms safe.
Teachers who are working remotely are coughing up thousands for new computers, office furniture, and professional subscriptions geared toward digital learning.
And despite the unprecedented strain on their budgets, for many teachers, there isn’t much relief in the way of reimbursements or tax write-offs.
entry.summary: For years, public school teachers have been digging into their own pockets to make up for school supply shortfalls. Impoverished school supply budgets and ill-equipped students, combined with demanding performance standards, leave teachers with little choice. And according to HuffPost, it appears the COVID-19 pandemic has made things even worse. Teachers who are still teaching in brick-and-mortar schools are personally supplying masks and hand sanitizer to keep their classrooms safe. Teachers who are working remotely are coughing up thousands for new computers, office furniture, and professional subscriptions geared toward digital learning. And despite the unprecedented strain on their budgets, for many teachers, there isn’t much relief in the way of reimbursements or tax write-offs.

entry.title: Le boom des masques transparents

link.title: Le boom des masques transparents

entry.content:
A Lentilly (Rhône), une entreprise fabrique 1500 masques transparents par semaine et les machines à coudre tournent à plein régime.
L’initiative vise à aider les personnes malentendantes, isolés par le port du masque. Les commandes affluents pour ce procurer ces masques lavables et à 13 euros l’unité, notamment de la part des métiers de services comme la restauration, mais aussi les crèches.
Aujourd’hui 4 ateliers fabriquent 1500 masques par semaine, mais pour faire face à la forte demande l’entreprise recherche de nouveaux locaux et de nouveaux collaborateurs avec pour objectif de tripler le volume de production.
entry.summary: A Lentilly (Rhône), une entreprise fabrique 1500 masques transparents par semaine et les machines à coudre tournent à plein régime. L’initiative vise à aider les personnes malentendantes, isolés par le port du masque. Les commandes affluents pour ce procurer ces masques lavables et à 13 euros l’unité, notamment de la part des métiers de services comme la restauration, mais aussi les crèches. Aujourd’hui 4 ateliers fabriquent 1500 masques par semaine, mais pour faire face à la forte demande l’entreprise recherche de nouveaux locaux et de nouveaux collaborateurs avec pour objectif de tripler le volume de production.

entry.title: #BiggBossTelugu4: First Nominations process started Oneindia Telugu

link.title: #BiggBossTelugu4: First Nominations process started Oneindia Telugu

entry.content:
Bigg Boss Telugu Season 4: Bigg Boss Telugu season started in high note as host of King Nagarajuna. The show started with electrifying start with introducing contestants of the show along with The promotional songs. In this juncture, First nomination process started in the house.
#BiggBossTeluguSeason4
#BiggBoss4nominationprocess
#BiggBossOpeningCeremony
#Gangavva
#BiggBossstarmaa
#KingNagarjuna
#BiggBoss4Telugucontestents
#BB4Telugu
#TV9newspresenterDevi
#NoelSean
#ChoreographerAmmaRajasekhar
#BiggBossnominations
#tollywood
బిగ్‌బాస్ తెలుగు రియాలిటీ షోలో సెలబ్రిటీల సందడి జోరుగానే మొదలైనట్టు స్పష్టమవుతున్నది. ఆదివారం ఇంట్లోకి వెళ్లిన సభ్యులకు బిగ్‌బాస్ నామినేషన్ ప్రక్రియను తెరపైకి తెచ్చి ఝలక్‌ను ఇచ్చారు. ఇప్పుడు ఇంట్లో సభ్యులు తమకు నచ్చని వారిని నామినేట్ చేయమంటూ టాస్క్ ఇచ్చారు. ఈ టాస్క్ సంబంధించిన ప్రోమో వీడియోను రిలీజ్ చేశారు. ఆ వీడియోలో చూపించిన ప్రకారం..నామినేషన్ ప్రక్రియలో భాగంగా తాము నామినేట్ చేయాలనకొన్న వ్యక్తి పేరు చెప్పి వారి ముందు ఉన్న కిటికిని మూసి వేయాలి. నామినేషన్ ప్రక్రియలో ఇంటి సభ్యులు పాల్గొన్నారు. నోయల్ సీన్, మోనాల్ గుజ్జర్, ఇతర ఇద్దరు కంటెస్టెంట్లు నామినేషన్ ప్రక్రియలో పాల్గొన్నారు.
entry.summary: Bigg Boss Telugu Season 4: Bigg Boss Telugu season started in high note as host of King Nagarajuna. The show started with electrifying start with introducing contestants of the show along with The promotional songs. In this juncture, First nomination process started in the house. #BiggBossTeluguSeason4 #BiggBoss4nominationprocess #BiggBossOpeningCeremony #Gangavva #BiggBossstarmaa #KingNagarjuna #BiggBoss4Telugucontestents #BB4Telugu #TV9newspresenterDevi #NoelSean #ChoreographerAmmaRajasekhar #BiggBossnominations #tollywood బిగ్‌బాస్ తెలుగు రియాలిటీ షోలో సెలబ్రిటీల సందడి జోరుగానే మొదలైనట్టు స్పష్టమవుతున్నది. ఆదివారం ఇంట్లోకి వెళ్లిన సభ్యులకు బిగ్‌బాస్ నామినేషన్ ప్రక్రియను తెరపైకి తెచ్చి ఝలక్‌ను ఇచ్చారు. ఇప్పుడు ఇంట్లో సభ్యులు తమకు నచ్చని వారిని నామినేట్ చేయమంటూ టాస్క్ ఇచ్చారు. ఈ టాస్క్ సంబంధించిన ప్రోమో వీడియోను రిలీజ్ చేశారు. ఆ వీడియోలో చూపించిన ప్రకారం..నామినేషన్ ప్రక్రియలో భాగంగా తాము నామినేట్ చేయాలనకొన్న వ్యక్తి పేరు చెప్పి వారి ముందు ఉన్న కిటికిని మూసి వేయాలి. నామినేషన్ ప్రక్రియలో ఇంటి సభ్యులు పాల్గొన్నారు. నోయల్ సీన్, మోనాల్ గుజ్జర్, ఇతర ఇద్దరు కంటెస్టెంట్లు నామినేషన్ ప్రక్రియలో పాల్గొన్నారు.

entry.title: ಕೊನೆಗೂ CCB ಪೋಲೀಸರ ಕೈಗೆ ತಗಲಾಕೊಂಡ Sanjjanaa Galrani Oneindia Kannada

link.title: ಕೊನೆಗೂ CCB ಪೋಲೀಸರ ಕೈಗೆ ತಗಲಾಕೊಂಡ Sanjjanaa Galrani Oneindia Kannada

entry.content:
CCB police who probing drug case detained Sanjjana Galrani after raid on Kannada actress house in Bengaluru.
#SanjjanaaGalrani #Arrested #CCB
ಬಹುಭಾಷಾ ನಟಿ ಸಂಜನಾ ಗಲ್ರಾನಿ ನಿವಾಸದ ಮೇಲೆ ಸಿಸಿಬಿ ಪೊಲೀಸರು ಮಂಗಳವಾರ ಮುಂಜಾನೆ ದಾಳಿ ಮಾಡಿದ್ದರು. ದಾಳಿಯ ಬಳಿಕ ಸಂಜನಾರನ್ನು ವಶಕ್ಕೆ ಪಡೆದಿದ್ದು, ಸಿಸಿಬಿ ಕಚೇರಿಗೆ ಕರೆದುಕೊಂಡು ಹೋಗುತ್ತಿದ್ದಾರೆ.
entry.summary: CCB police who probing drug case detained Sanjjana Galrani after raid on Kannada actress house in Bengaluru. #SanjjanaaGalrani #Arrested #CCB ಬಹುಭಾಷಾ ನಟಿ ಸಂಜನಾ ಗಲ್ರಾನಿ ನಿವಾಸದ ಮೇಲೆ ಸಿಸಿಬಿ ಪೊಲೀಸರು ಮಂಗಳವಾರ ಮುಂಜಾನೆ ದಾಳಿ ಮಾಡಿದ್ದರು. ದಾಳಿಯ ಬಳಿಕ ಸಂಜನಾರನ್ನು ವಶಕ್ಕೆ ಪಡೆದಿದ್ದು, ಸಿಸಿಬಿ ಕಚೇರಿಗೆ ಕರೆದುಕೊಂಡು ಹೋಗುತ್ತಿದ್ದಾರೆ.

entry.title: Ma vie sans portable

link.title: Ma vie sans portable

entry.content:
Rodolphe, 14 ans, et Séverine, 42 ans, sont rivés à leur smartphone. Pour "Envoyé spécial", ils ont accepté de s’en passer complètement pendant deux semaines. Comment vont-ils vivre ce "sevrage" ?
Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :
entry.summary: Rodolphe, 14 ans, et Séverine, 42 ans, sont rivés à leur smartphone. Pour "Envoyé spécial", ils ont accepté de s’en passer complètement pendant deux semaines. Comment vont-ils vivre ce "sevrage" ? Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :

entry.title: Kangana Ranuat Reached Mumbai: Shivsena ने Airport पर दिखाए काले झंडे BMC JCB वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Kangana Ranuat Reached Mumbai: Shivsena ने Airport पर दिखाए काले झंडे BMC JCB वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
Kangana Ranaut has reached Mumbai with the security of her Y-category. Kangana Ranaut reached Mumbai at 2:45 pm on Wednesday. There was a huge commotion at the airport. Kangana Ranaut was opposed by Shiv Sainiks at Mumbai Airport and showed them black flags. Supporters of the Republican Party of India and Karni Sena also reached the airport. Who was standing in the reception of Kangana But on the opposition of Shiv Sena, supporters of Republican Party of India and Karni Sena and Shiv Sena came face to face.
कंगना रनौत अपनी Y-कैटिगरी की सुरक्षा के साथ मुंबई पहुंच चुकी हैं. कंगना रनौत बुधवार दोपहर 2:45 बजे मुंबई पहुंची. एयरपोर्ट पर भारी हंगामा हुआ. मुंबई एयरपोर्ट पर कंगना रनौत का शिवसैनिकों ने विरोध किया और उन्हें काले झंडे दिखाए. रिपब्लिकन पार्टी ऑफ इंडिया और कर्णी सेना के समर्थक भी एयरपोर्ट पहुंचे थे. जो कंगना के स्वागत में खड़े थे. लेकिन शिवसेना के विरोध पर रिपब्लिकन पार्टी ऑफ इंडिया और कर्णी सेना के समर्थक और शिवसेना आमने-सामने आ गए.
#KanganaRanuat #Shivsena #oneindiahindi
entry.summary: Kangana Ranaut has reached Mumbai with the security of her Y-category. Kangana Ranaut reached Mumbai at 2:45 pm on Wednesday. There was a huge commotion at the airport. Kangana Ranaut was opposed by Shiv Sainiks at Mumbai Airport and showed them black flags. Supporters of the Republican Party of India and Karni Sena also reached the airport. Who was standing in the reception of Kangana But on the opposition of Shiv Sena, supporters of Republican Party of India and Karni Sena and Shiv Sena came face to face. कंगना रनौत अपनी Y-कैटिगरी की सुरक्षा के साथ मुंबई पहुंच चुकी हैं. कंगना रनौत बुधवार दोपहर 2:45 बजे मुंबई पहुंची. एयरपोर्ट पर भारी हंगामा हुआ. मुंबई एयरपोर्ट पर कंगना रनौत का शिवसैनिकों ने विरोध किया और उन्हें काले झंडे दिखाए. रिपब्लिकन पार्टी ऑफ इंडिया और कर्णी सेना के समर्थक भी एयरपोर्ट पहुंचे थे. जो कंगना के स्वागत में खड़े थे. लेकिन शिवसेना के विरोध पर रिपब्लिकन पार्टी ऑफ इंडिया और कर्णी सेना के समर्थक और शिवसेना आमने-सामने आ गए. #KanganaRanuat #Shivsena #oneindiahindi

entry.title: Epic Games renews legal request to restore Fortnite on Apple’s app store

link.title: Epic Games renews legal request to restore Fortnite on Apple’s app store

entry.content:
애플과 갈등 에픽, 포트나이트 앱스토어 입점허용 법원에 재요구
Now moving on to the latest in the ongoing battle between Apple and Epic Games.
Epic Games last week filed for a preliminary injunction over Apple’s blocking of its video game Fortnite on its app stores.
The gaming company says more than 116 million gamers have played Fortnite on iOS, making it the game’s biggest platform.
It slammed Apple as a "monopolist" and said Epic Games will suffer "irreparable harm" if Apple continues the ban.
Apple had delisted Fortnite in August after Epic Games introduced a direct payment option without Apple’s consent.
Epic Games was already denied an order last month seeking to have the game restored.
entry.summary: 애플과 갈등 에픽, 포트나이트 앱스토어 입점허용 법원에 재요구 Now moving on to the latest in the ongoing battle between Apple and Epic Games. Epic Games last week filed for a preliminary injunction over Apple’s blocking of its video game Fortnite on its app stores. The gaming company says more than 116 million gamers have played Fortnite on iOS, making it the game’s biggest platform. It slammed Apple as a "monopolist" and said Epic Games will suffer "irreparable harm" if Apple continues the ban. Apple had delisted Fortnite in August after Epic Games introduced a direct payment option without Apple’s consent. Epic Games was already denied an order last month seeking to have the game restored.

entry.title: 01Hebdo #280 : comment Huawei compte remplacer Android ?

link.title: 01Hebdo #280 : comment Huawei compte remplacer Android ?

entry.content:
Au programme de ce 01Hebdo 280 :
- La keynote Apple aura lieu le 15 septembre
- Apple attaque Epic en justice
- Les enchères 5G démarreront le 29/09
- Huawei dévoile Harmony OS
- Xbox présente la Xbox Series S
- La ScanWatch de Withings : Lucie Broto, directrice marketing de la marque est sur le plateau
- Les coulisses du Tour de France avec Amélie Charnay
- Sony reste-t-il le leader sur le marché de la réduction de bruit ?
entry.summary: Au programme de ce 01Hebdo 280 : - La keynote Apple aura lieu le 15 septembre - Apple attaque Epic en justice - Les enchères 5G démarreront le 29/09 - Huawei dévoile Harmony OS - Xbox présente la Xbox Series S - La ScanWatch de Withings : Lucie Broto, directrice marketing de la marque est sur le plateau - Les coulisses du Tour de France avec Amélie Charnay - Sony reste-t-il le leader sur le marché de la réduction de bruit ?

entry.title: فيديو خاص بـ’هي’ - ما البدلة التي تناسب مزاجك اليوم؟

link.title: فيديو خاص بـ’هي’ - ما البدلة التي تناسب مزاجك اليوم؟

entry.content:
البدلة، من أكثر الإطلالات تميّزاّ نظراً للاحتمالات الواسعة والتصاميم المتعددة التي تتيحها لنا دور الأزياء العالمية في هذا المجال. فللبدلة الرسمية سحرها الخاص ورونقها المميز أكان من خلال الألوان التي لا تعد ولا تخصى، أم من خلال تنسيق الاكسسوارات معها التي تبدّلها من إطلالة رسمية راقية الى إطلالة كاجوال وعصرية.
من الاختيارات التالية ما البدلة التي تناسبك؟ الأسود الكلاسيكي؟ أم البيج بأسلوب رجولي؟ أم الأحمر المخملي؟
الإطلالة الكاجوال قبل التبديل:
سروال من Tibi لدى Shopbop.com
حذاء من Giuseppe Zanotti
إطلالة البدلة الأولى:
بلوزة من Pretty Little Things
بدلة من MaxMara
حقيبة من Moynat
حذاء من Giuseppe Zanotti
نظارات شمسية من Karen Wazen
إطلالة البدلة الثانية:
قميص وربطة من Elisabetta Franchi
بدلة من MaxMara
حذاء من Tom Ford
حقيبة من Christian Louboutin
إطلالة البدلة الثالثة:
نظارات شمسية من Gucci
قميص من Dior
سروال وجاكيت من Tom Ford
حذاء رياضي من Givenchy
———
إشراف: سينتيا قطار
إعداد: مايا صبّاح
تصوير: محمد هلو وغيث طنجور
مونتاج: محمد هلو
تنسيق ازياء: سيليا اوكوينيا
مكياج: Guerlain
تصفيف شعر: صالون La Loge
entry.summary: البدلة، من أكثر الإطلالات تميّزاّ نظراً للاحتمالات الواسعة والتصاميم المتعددة التي تتيحها لنا دور الأزياء العالمية في هذا المجال. فللبدلة الرسمية سحرها الخاص ورونقها المميز أكان من خلال الألوان التي لا تعد ولا تخصى، أم من خلال تنسيق الاكسسوارات معها التي تبدّلها من إطلالة رسمية راقية الى إطلالة كاجوال وعصرية. من الاختيارات التالية ما البدلة التي تناسبك؟ الأسود الكلاسيكي؟ أم البيج بأسلوب رجولي؟ أم الأحمر المخملي؟ الإطلالة الكاجوال قبل التبديل: سروال من Tibi لدى Shopbop.com حذاء من Giuseppe Zanotti إطلالة البدلة الأولى: بلوزة من Pretty Little Things بدلة من MaxMara حقيبة من Moynat حذاء من Giuseppe Zanotti نظارات شمسية من Karen Wazen إطلالة البدلة الثانية: قميص وربطة من Elisabetta Franchi بدلة من MaxMara حذاء من Tom Ford حقيبة من Christian Louboutin إطلالة البدلة الثالثة: نظارات شمسية من Gucci قميص من Dior سروال وجاكيت من Tom Ford حذاء رياضي من Givenchy ——— إشراف: سينتيا قطار إعداد: مايا صبّاح تصوير: محمد هلو وغيث طنجور مونتاج: محمد هلو تنسيق ازياء: سيليا اوكوينيا مكياج: Guerlain تصفيف شعر: صالون La Loge

entry.title: Kawal Pilkada, Pangdam VI Mulawarman Tegaskan TNI Netral

link.title: Kawal Pilkada, Pangdam VI Mulawarman Tegaskan TNI Netral

entry.content:
BANJARMASIN, KOMPAS.TV Panglima Kodam (PANGDAM) VI/Mulawarman Mayjen TNI Heri Wiranto memimpin penutupan gelar Apel Komandan Satuan (DANSAT) Tersebar Tahun 2020 secara Virtual untuk pertama kalinya.
Apel digelar rabu siang (9/9/2020) di Gedung Mahligai Pancasila kediaman Gubernur Kalsel di Banjarmasin Kalimantan Selatan setelah sebelumnya, dibuka di Kalimantan Utara.
Apel ini dilaksanakan di tiga wilayah kodam mulawarman secara virtual selama dua hari dan mengusung tema "Dengan Apel Komandan Satuan, kita wujudkan Satuan yang Profesional, Berdisiplin Tinggi, Solid, Sinergi dengan semua elemen bangsa, Tangguh, Berwawasan Kebangsaan dan Dicintai Rakyat di Wilayah Kodam VI/Mulawarman.
"Pedoman para peserta dalam pelaksanaan Apel Komandan Satuan juga tujuan kegiatan ini, juga untuk menyatukan visi dan misi, menciptakan kesamaan dalam pemahaman nilai-nilai jati diri prajurit Kodam VI/Mulawarman guna memelihara soliditas yang dibangun melalui komunikasi dua arah antara pimpinan Kodam VI/Mulawarman dengan para komandan satuan", ujar Pangdam dalam sambutannya.
Dalam Apel ini, Mayjen TNI Heri Wiranto menegaskan prajurit harus menyatukan visi dan misi dalam penyampaian nilai-nilai jati diri prajurit.
Seperti agar bersikap netral dalam pelaksanaan pesta demokrasi Pemilihan Kepala Daerah Serentak pada desember 2020 nanti.
"Kuncinya satu TNI netral dan prajurit harus netral, tidak boleh berpihak pada salah satu kontestan atau calon. Kita bertugas justru mengamankan dan menertibkan jalannya pesta demokrasi," terang Pangdam.
Mayjen TNI Heri Wiranto juga menegaskan agar para Komandan Jajaran Kodam VI Mulawarman , agar terus mengawal tindakan Percepatan Pencegahan Covid 19 dan Karhutla di Kalimantan Selatan khususnya.
entry.summary: BANJARMASIN, KOMPAS.TV Panglima Kodam (PANGDAM) VI/Mulawarman Mayjen TNI Heri Wiranto memimpin penutupan gelar Apel Komandan Satuan (DANSAT) Tersebar Tahun 2020 secara Virtual untuk pertama kalinya. Apel digelar rabu siang (9/9/2020) di Gedung Mahligai Pancasila kediaman Gubernur Kalsel di Banjarmasin Kalimantan Selatan setelah sebelumnya, dibuka di Kalimantan Utara. Apel ini dilaksanakan di tiga wilayah kodam mulawarman secara virtual selama dua hari dan mengusung tema "Dengan Apel Komandan Satuan, kita wujudkan Satuan yang Profesional, Berdisiplin Tinggi, Solid, Sinergi dengan semua elemen bangsa, Tangguh, Berwawasan Kebangsaan dan Dicintai Rakyat di Wilayah Kodam VI/Mulawarman. "Pedoman para peserta dalam pelaksanaan Apel Komandan Satuan juga tujuan kegiatan ini, juga untuk menyatukan visi dan misi, menciptakan kesamaan dalam pemahaman nilai-nilai jati diri prajurit Kodam VI/Mulawarman guna memelihara soliditas yang dibangun melalui komunikasi dua arah antara pimpinan Kodam VI/Mulawarman dengan para komandan satuan", ujar Pangdam dalam sambutannya. Dalam Apel ini, Mayjen TNI Heri Wiranto menegaskan prajurit harus menyatukan visi dan misi dalam penyampaian nilai-nilai jati diri prajurit. Seperti agar bersikap netral dalam pelaksanaan pesta demokrasi Pemilihan Kepala Daerah Serentak pada desember 2020 nanti. "Kuncinya satu TNI netral dan prajurit harus netral, tidak boleh berpihak pada salah satu kontestan atau calon. Kita bertugas justru mengamankan dan menertibkan jalannya pesta demokrasi," terang Pangdam. Mayjen TNI Heri Wiranto juga menegaskan agar para Komandan Jajaran Kodam VI Mulawarman , agar terus mengawal tindakan Percepatan Pencegahan Covid 19 dan Karhutla di Kalimantan Selatan khususnya.
